name: jianmu-ipc
description: Real-time IPC hub for multi-AI-agent communication.

interface.shortDescription: Real-time IPC for multi-agent Codex sessions
interface.longDescription: Jianmu IPC bundles an MCP server and usage skill for routing messages, topic updates, and durable backlog reads across AI coding sessions through a shared WebSocket hub.
defaultPrompt: Use Jianmu IPC to send a task to another coding session.
Use Jianmu IPC to check recent messages and report status.
